title: ARIA Identity Document (AID) v1.0
description: JSON Schema for the ARIA Identity Document — a W3C Verifiable Credential (VC Data Model 2.0) that serves as a cryptographically-signed identity document for AI agents, anchored to DNS.

@context.description: JSON-LD context. Must include the W3C VC v2 context and the ARIA v1 context.

type.description: Credential type. Must include VerifiableCredential and ARIAIdentityDocument.

id.description: The DID of the agent. Format: did:aria:<domain>:<agent-name>.

issuer.description: The DID of the issuing registry. Typically did:aria:registry.aria.bar.

validFrom.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the credential becomes valid.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the credential expires. Maximum 1-year validity from issuance.

id.description: URI identifying the status entry. Format: <statusListCredential>#<index>.

statusPurpose.description: Purpose of the status check. Always 'revocation' for AID documents.

statusListIndex.description: Index position in the status list bitstring.

statusListCredential.description: URI of the StatusList credential containing the bitstring.

id.description: The DID of the agent. Must match the top-level 'id' field.

agentName.description: Human-readable agent name. 1-64 characters, alphanumeric and hyphens only. Must start and end with an alphanumeric character.

version.description: Semantic version of the agent software.

trustLevel.description: Trust level assigned to the agent. L0=Anchored, L1=Identified, L2=Certified, L3=Sovereign.

items.description: Scope in ARIA namespace format: namespace:resource:action.

scope.description: Authorized scopes from the ARIA Scope Registry.

hitlRequired.description: Scope identifiers that require human-in-the-loop approval before execution.

delegationDepth.description: Current delegation depth. 0 means directly issued by the principal.

maxDelegationDepth.description: Maximum allowed delegation depth for further sub-delegations.

spec_version.description: ARIA specification version. Must be '1.0' for this schema version.

did.description: DID of the principal (legal entity or person) on whose behalf the agent operates.

legalName.description: Legal name of the principal organization or person.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the principal's legal jurisdiction.

principal.description: The legal principal (organization or person) responsible for the agent.

dnsAnchor.description: DNS TXT record content anchoring this AID to the principal's domain. Format: v=ARIA1;id=<did>;h=sha256:<hash>;r=<resolution-url>.

credentialSubject.description: The subject of the credential — the AI agent and its attributes.

cryptosuite.description: Composite cryptographic suite: ML-DSA-65 (post-quantum, FIPS 204) + Ed25519 (classical).

created.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the proof was created.

proofPurpose.description: The purpose of the proof. Always 'assertionMethod' for AID issuance.

verificationMethod.description: DID URL of the verification key used to create the proof.

proof.description: W3C Data Integrity proof containing the composite post-quantum + classical signature.
